name: Eesel AI
description: AI teammate that plugs into helpdesks like Zendesk, Freshdesk, Intercom and Gorgias to autonomously answer tickets.

seo.title: Eesel AI — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Eesel AI: AI teammate that plugs into helpdesks like Zendesk, Freshdesk, Intercom and Gorgias to autonomously answer tickets.

when_to_use: AI auto-reply for Zendesk tickets using help center content
Reducing first response time with AI draft suggestions
Automating tier-1 Intercom conversations with RAG answers
Support deflection by AI answering repetitive questions

pros: Plugs into Zendesk, Intercom, Freshdesk fast
Autonomous ticket resolution for common intents
Easy no-code setup on top of existing kb
cons: Quality depends on kb coverage and tagging
Limited if your support is phone-heavy
Small vendor versus incumbents shipping AI
review.verdict: A pragmatic AI layer on existing helpdesks, good value until Zendesk or Intercom catch up natively.
review.best_for: Support teams on Zendesk or Intercom wanting quick AI deflection without rip-and-replace.
review.not_for: Voice-first contact centers or teams rebuilding support from scratch.
